hero.h1: I design systems so people and organizations work better.
problem.heading: The problem nobody names
problem.body1: The most ambitious people (founders, executives, innovators, entrepreneurs, managers) are excellent at their work and mediocre at designing how they work. Not because they lack discipline. Because nobody taught them to build the system behind the result.
problem.body2: Operating without a clear system has a direct cost: slow decisions, scattered energy, and teams running at half capacity because the work design is poor. We don't need more effort. We need better design.
services.heading: I want to help you grow
services.growth_os.title: Growth OS
services.growth_os.desc: The personal 90-day operating system. Replaces motivation with structure. A full quarter, three goals, a system that decides for you when you don't feel like it.
services.advisory.title: Advisory & Consulting
services.advisory.desc: Strategic 1:1 accompaniment for leaders who want to operate with more clarity and better results.
services.speaking.title: Speaking & Workshops
services.speaking.desc: Keynotes and workshops on systems thinking, institutional transformation, leadership and applied execution.
testimonials.heading: What those who've worked with me say
footer.bio: Francisco Abad has built, led and transformed real systems. He founded CODEIS 10 years ago, led the IESS (Ecuador's largest public institution), and has built multiple initiatives in tech, education and consulting. Today he designs systems for founders, executives and organizations to operate with more clarity, execution and results.

page.index.desc: I design systems so people and organizations work better.
